'''''Valkyrie'' 1''' was a roleplaying magazine from September of [[1994]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The adventure was called "[[Operation Phoenix]]" and was written by [[Stuart Watkins]].
